info.name: OmniConnect API Collection
info.description: Complete API collection for all panels: Super Admin, Company Admin, Agent, WebChat, and Public APIs

variable.description: Salesforce ID (SF_id) for handyman contact in mobile app
Salesforce ID for handyman contact (use this for mobile app management APIs)

request.description: Create the first super admin user
Check if super admin already exists
Get webhook URLs for all channels
Global search across contacts, conversations, users, deals, messages

item.name: Mobile App Management
item.description:
Admin APIs to enable/disable mobile app for Handyman contacts. Requires Company Admin or Super Admin authentication.

**Important:** All requests use `sfId` (Salesforce ID) from the Contact's `SF_id` field, NOT the MongoDB `contactId` (_id).

request.description:
Enable mobile app for a Handyman contact. This will:
- Set `mobileAppEnabled = true`
- Generate a temporary password (8 characters)
- Set password expiration (30 days)
- Send activation email with credentials

**Requirements:**
- Admin authentication (Company Admin or Super Admin)
- Contact must have `Contact_Type = 'Handyman'`
- Contact must have an email address
- Contact must not already have mobile app enabled

**Request Body:**
- `sfId`: Salesforce ID (SF_id) of the handyman contact (NOT MongoDB contactId)
- `companyId`: Company ID

**Response:**
- Returns SF ID, email, and password expiration date
- Activation email sent to contact's email address

Disable mobile app for a Handyman contact. This will:
- Set `mobileAppEnabled = false`
- Remove refresh token (invalidates all sessions)

**Requirements:**
- Admin authentication (Company Admin or Super Admin)
- Contact must exist

**Request Body:**
- `sfId`: Salesforce ID (SF_id) of the handyman contact (NOT MongoDB contactId)
- `companyId`: Company ID
- `action`: "disable"

**Note:** User will not be able to login after this action

Reset mobile app password for a Handyman contact. This will:
- Generate a new temporary password
- Set password expiration (30 days)
- Reset `mobilePasswordChanged` flag to false
- Invalidate all existing sessions (remove refresh token)
- Send password reset email with new temporary password

**Requirements:**
- Admin authentication (Company Admin or Super Admin)
- Contact must have mobile app enabled
- Contact must have an email address

**Request Body:**
- `sfId`: Salesforce ID (SF_id) of the handyman contact (NOT MongoDB contactId)
- `companyId`: Company ID
- `action`: "reset"

**Use Cases:**
- User forgot password
- Admin needs to reset user's access
- Security incident requiring password reset

item.name: Mobile App Authentication
item.description: Authentication APIs for Handyman Mobile App (React Native). Only contacts with Contact_Type='Handyman' and mobileAppEnabled=true can access these endpoints.

exec: console.log('✅ Mobile tokens saved to collection variables');

request.description:
Login with email and temporary password. Returns access token, refresh token, and requiresPasswordChange flag.

**Requirements:**
- Contact must have `Contact_Type = 'Handyman'`
- Contact must have `mobileAppEnabled = true`
- Valid temporary password (expires in 30 days)

**Response:**
- Returns `contact.sfId` (Salesforce ID) in the response
- If `requiresPasswordChange: true`, user must change password on first login
- `mobileSFId` variable is automatically saved from response

Change password (required on first login or for password reset).

**Requirements:**
- Valid access token in Authorization header
- `oldPassword`: Temporary password (first time) or current password (subsequent changes)
- `newPassword`: Must be at least 8 characters long

**Note:** After first password change, `mobilePasswordChanged` flag is set to true
Change password after first login (requires current password).

Request password reset. Generates new temporary password and sends it via email.

**Requirements:**
- Valid access token in Authorization header
- Contact must be authenticated

**Note:** New temporary password will be sent to contact's email address. User must login with new temp password and change it.

Verify if access token is valid and get contact information.

**Response:**
- Returns `sfId` (Salesforce ID), email, and companyId

**Use Cases:**
- Check token validity on app startup
- Validate authentication before making other API calls
- Get current contact information

exec: console.log('✅ Mobile tokens refreshed and saved');

request.description:
Refresh access token using refresh token. Returns new access and refresh tokens.

**Token Expiry:**
- Access Token: 7 days
- Refresh Token: 30 days

**Use Cases:**
- Refresh token when access token expires
- Implement automatic token refresh in mobile app

Logout and invalidate refresh token.

**Requirements:**
- Valid access token in Authorization header

**Note:** After logout, refresh token is removed and cannot be used to get new access tokens. User must login again.

item.name: Mobile App Jobs & Workflow
item.description: APIs for managing jobs/deals in the mobile app. All operations are real-time with socket support. Jobs = Deals in the system.

request.description:
Get all jobs for handyman organized by date.

**Response Structure:**
- `unscheduled`: Jobs without appointment date
- `today`: Today's jobs (sorted by time)
- `tomorrow`: Tomorrow's jobs
- `future`: Future jobs (sorted by date)
- `past`: Past jobs

**Real-time Updates:**
- Subscribe to socket room: `mobile:handyman:{sfId}`
- Events: `job:new`, `job:status_changed`, `job:update`

Get detailed information about a single job including visit timeline, diagnostic, protocol, and invoice info.

**Response includes:**
- Job basic info (name, status, progress)
- Customer details
- Visit timeline (for multi-visit jobs)
- Current diagnostic
- Protocol information
- Invoice status

Start work on a job. Records GPS location, start time, and updates status to 'Diagnostic running'.

**Actions:**
- Records GPS coordinates
- Validates distance from customer address (alerts if > 500m)
- Sets start time for current visit
- Updates status to 'Diagnostic running'

**Real-time Events:**
- Emits `job:started` to handyman and company rooms

Submit diagnostic form with work details, materials, and photos.

**Required Fields:**
- `estimatedWorkTime`: Hours (number)

**Optional Fields:**
- `kilometersPerVisit`: Distance in km
- `estimatedVisits`: Number of visits needed (1-5)
- `materials`: Array of material objects
- `photosBefore`: Array of photo URLs
- `reasonForNextVisit`: Reason if multiple visits
- `materialPurchaseHours`: Hours for material purchase
- `complexPriceCalculation`: Boolean (if price needs calculation later)

**Real-time Events:**
- Emits `job:diagnostic_submitted` to trigger price calculation

Update job status and progress.

**Status Values:**
- Schedule appointment
- Scheduled
- Diagnostic running
- Calculating
- Continue work
- Waiting for approval
- Protocol creation
- Protocol signed
- Invoice process
- Invoice paid
- Cancelled

**Real-time Events:**
- Emits `job:status_changed` with updated progress percentage

Update GPS location for real-time tracking.

**Use Cases:**
- Real-time location tracking during work
- Office can see handyman location
- Route optimization

**Real-time Events:**
- Emits `mobile:job:location_update` to company room

Manage visits for multi-visit jobs.

**Actions:**
- `create`: Create new visit (1-5)
- `update`: Update visit details
- `delete`: Request visit deletion (sent to office for approval)
- `complete`: Mark visit as completed

**Real-time Events:**
- Emits `mobile:job:visit_updated` to handyman and company rooms

Create and manage protocols.

**Actions:**
- `create`: Create new protocol (standard, diagnostic, surcharge)
- `sign`: Add customer signature to protocol
- `upload`: Upload protocol PDF file

**Protocol Types:**
- `standard`: Standard work protocol
- `diagnostic`: Diagnostic-only protocol
- `surcharge`: Surcharge agreement protocol

**Real-time Events:**
- Emits `mobile:job:protocol_updated` to handyman and company rooms

Handle invoice process.

**Actions:**
- `create`: Create invoice (usually done by system)
- `update`: Update invoice details
- `mark_paid`: Mark invoice as paid

**Real-time Events:**
- Emits `mobile:job:invoice_updated` to handyman and company rooms
